# glitchtip_projects (Data Source)

Lists all projects in a GlitchTip organization. Useful for iterating over existing projects (e.g. with `for_each`) without enumerating them by hand.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all projects in an organization.
data "glitchtip_projects" "all" {
  organization = "acme-inc"
}

output "project_slugs" {
  value = [for p in data.glitchtip_projects.all.projects : p.slug]
}

# Example use: attach an alert to every existing project.
resource "glitchtip_project_alert" "errors" {
  for_each = { for p in data.glitchtip_projects.all.projects : p.slug => p }

  organization     = "acme-inc"
  project          = each.value.slug
  name             = "High error rate"
  timespan_minutes = 10
  quantity         = 100

  alert_recipients = [
    { recipient_type = "email" },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) Slug of the organization whose projects are listed.

### Read-Only

- `projects` (Attributes List) All projects in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the project was created.
- `event_throttle_rate` (Number) Probability (in percent) of events throttled at the project level.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the project.
- `name` (String) Human-readable name of the project.
- `platform` (String) Platform identifier for the project.
- `scrub_ip_addresses` (Boolean) Whether GlitchTip scrubs IP addresses from events for this project.
- `slug` (String) URL-safe slug identifying the project within its organization.
